response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates solid software engineering fundamentals and significantly exceeds the 3+ years experience requirement, they lack several critical qualifications for this specialized embedded networking security role. Most critically, there is no native-level Japanese proficiency (a required qualification), no demonstrated C programming expertise (required for UNIX development), and no background in the security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption) or networking domains (Layer-2/3, switch operation, SNMP/NETCONF) that are central to the position. The candidate's background is primarily in web, mobile, and full-stack development rather than embedded firmware for network switches.
strengths: Significantly exceeds 3+ years requirement with 15+ years of software development experience across multiple technology stacks
Fluent English speaker capable of reading technical documentation and written communication
Demonstrated Linux experience and infrastructure expertise including CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, and system administration
concerns: Missing native-level Japanese language proficiency despite being an explicitly required qualification
No demonstrated C programming expertise; background shows primarily web/mobile development languages rather than systems-level programming
Absence of security technologies (encryption, 802.1X, attack detection) and networking experience (Layer-2/3, switch operation, SNMP, NETCONF) that are core responsibilities

key_factors.factor: No C programming or embedded firmware experience
No security or networking domain expertise
